db_instance_class.description: Specifies the type of database instance, determining the computing and memory capacity.

duration.description: The length of the reservation in seconds, representing the commitment period for the reserved instance.

multi_az.description: Indicates whether the reserved instance is configured for Multi-AZ deployment, which provides high availability.

offering_type.description: The pricing model for the reserved instance, such as 'No Upfront' or 'Partial Upfront'.

product_description.description: A description of the reserved instance product, often detailing the database engine and license model.
